characters.name: Bonnor Twins
characters.description: John and Connor Bonnorare the school and neighborhood bullying twins. They were born in Ireland and attend a private school, where they constantly bullyMartin Moone. They destroyed his birthday bicycle. Martin's dad went to go beat up their father when he learned of the incident.

characters.name: Debra Moone
characters.description: Debra Moone is the mother ofMartin Mooneand the wife ofLiam Moone.

characters.name: Debra Moone
characters.description: Debra Moone is the mother ofMartin Mooneand the wife ofLiam Moone.

characters.name: Fidelma Moone
characters.description:
Fidelma "Delma" (née Moone)isMartin Moone's sister.  Fidelma was born to Debra and Liam Moone. She grew up in Ireland with her two sisters and brother.   
Fidelma got engaged to her boyfriend Dessie.  
On Saint Patrick's Day, heavily pregnant, Fidelma was to be married by the local priest. Fidelma's water broke on the alter. She and Dessie were married on the way to the hospital, where she gave birth to a baby girl.That day was Saint Patrick's Day as well as Fidelma's wedding day and birthday of Fidelma's daughter.

characters.name: Martin Moone
characters.description: Martin Paul Kenny Dalglish Moone, known by peers as "Moone Boy": is a young boy with animaginary friendliving in Boyle, Ireland during the late '80s.  He attends an all boys private school where he wears a red uniform. Later in the show he attends a new school for secondary school that has dark green jumpers as uniforms. He has three sisters and niece. He's dream was to be an alter boy, which he was but he was kicked out for being a snitch

characters.name: Sinead Moone
characters.description: Sinead MooneisMartin Moone's third and closest sister. She loves nothing more than to make a fool of her little brother.  She also attends a private school that requires a uniform, but not Martin's school.
